title: Berliner Dom Before and After - Quick Summary
items: **The Berliner Dom is not a simple replica.** It is the same building, changed by war, GDR reconstruction and post-reunification restoration.
**The imperial cathedral opened in 1905** after the old building was demolished to make way for a more prestigious new Dom.
**A bomb hit the dome lantern on 24 May 1944,** causing catastrophic fire damage and collapse inside the church.
**The missing northern Memorial Church matters most:** official Dom history says roughly one third of the old building is absent today.
**The Dom reopened in 1993,** but interior restoration continued into 1999 and 2002, so the building you see is a layered survivor.
